summary: Iteration 155 Phase B — AI-powered cake services testing complete. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 9 AI sections verified in AI Studio tab.

minor.issue: LLM occasionally returns malformed JSON for minimal test images (edge case)

critical_code_review_comments: All 10 feature flags correctly returned by GET /api/cake-ai/features
Photoreal endpoints (B3) correctly gated with HTTP 402 when FAL_KEY not set
Feasibility check (B4) correctly flags: tilt > 0.31 as HIGH, 0.17-0.31 as WARN, drip on topsy_turvy as WARN, upper tier wider as HIGH
BEO PDF (B5) returns valid PDF with %PDF-1.4 header, includes client block, tier construction, delivery, pricing
Timeline planner (B6) returns >= 50 hours with sugar flowers + mirror glaze, windows are chronological
Allergen propagation (B7) correctly flags hazelnut + praline violation
Design Library (B9) save/list/duplicate all working, duplicate returns 'session_id' field
Pricing suggest (B10) applies correct multipliers for fondant + cascading_roses + topper, rush_order applies 1.25 premium
AI Descriptions (B2) uses Claude Sonnet 4.5, returns headline + long_description + 6 hashtags
Frontend AI Studio tab renders all 9 sections with correct data-testid attributes
test_credentials: No auth required for tested endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter155 Phase B delivered 10 AI-powered cake services. All endpoints tested: (1) GET /api/cake-ai/features returns 10 flags, (2) POST /api/cake-ai/palette/extract uses Gemini vision, (3) POST /api/cake-ai/descriptions/generate uses Claude Sonnet 4.5, (4) POST /api/cake-ai/photoreal/render returns 402 (FAL_KEY gated), (5) POST /api/cake-ai/feasibility/check with rule-based tilt/overhang checks, (6) GET /api/cake-ai/beo/pdf/{session_id} returns reportlab PDF, (7) GET /api/cake-ai/timeline/plan with critical-path planning, (8) POST /api/cake-ai/allergens/propagate with FILLING_ALLERGENS map, (9) POST /api/cake-ai/library/save-look + GET /api/cake-ai/library/looks + POST /api/cake-ai/library/looks/{id}/duplicate, (10) POST /api/cake-ai/pricing/suggest with tier/decoration multipliers. Frontend AI Studio tab accessible via sidebar → Culinary Operations → Cake Viewer · 3D → AI Studio tab.
